description_long: This is a modern L-shaped sectional couch with a left-facing chaise, upholstered in a smooth, solid gray fabric. The couch features three large, rectangular back cushions and two seat cushions, with the chaise section forming a continuous seat. The armrests are straight, boxy, and of medium height, matching the overall minimalist design. The legs are short, cylindrical, and black, slightly elevating the couch above the ground. The upholstery appears tightly fitted, with no visible tufting, patterns, or accent pillows. The overall design is sleek and functional, suitable for contemporary urban interiors or public waiting areas.
description: A modern L-shaped gray sectional couch with a left-facing chaise, straight armrests, and black cylindrical legs. Features smooth upholstery and three back cushions.
description_view_0: Front angled view showing the L-shape, left-facing chaise, three back cushions, and both armrests.
description_view_1: Side view from the chaise end, highlighting the depth of the chaise and the straight armrest on the left.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous backrest and the alignment of the three back cushions.
description_view_3: Side view from the main seat end, showing the right armrest and the length of the main seating area.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three large, loose back cushions and two seat cushions, with the chaise forming a continuous seat; no accent or throw pillows visible.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid gray fabric with a smooth, tightly fitted appearance and no visible patterns, tufting, or decorative stitching.
attribute_leg_style: Short, exposed, cylindrical black legs, evenly spaced and slightly elevating the couch.
attribute_armrest_design: Straight, boxy armrests of medium height, fully upholstered in the same gray fabric as the rest of the couch.
attribute_backrest_type: Low, divided backrest with three large, loose cushions; continuous and cushioned with no tufting or decorative features.
